subcodes.first_line: O manifestation of true wisdom! The love of God is even as the garment of Joseph, the All-Merciful, whose sweet fragrance perfumeth the horizons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مظهر عرفان حقیقت محبه الله چون قمیص یوسف رحمان است که رائحه طیبه اش آفاق را
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @nearness and remoteness
